what_it_does: Records an image attachment for the design-source channel, linking attachment id att-1b75dc12 to the image asset image://design-source/company-info/p-09 and recording when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter is the entire file; there is no body content.
The attachment id in the frontmatter matches the filename stem (att-1b75dc12).
The target is a custom URI using the image:// scheme pointing to design-source/company-info/p-09.
An ISO-8601 added timestamp is present.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Attachment files are stored under channel-memory/channel_attachments/ and named after their id.
References external assets via a URI scheme rather than a filesystem path.
concerns: The target URI provides no file extension, MIME type, dimensions, or checksum, so the actual asset is not verifiable from this file alone.
There is no explicit parent channel-memory entry id, caption, alt text, or author.
notes: This is a minimal metadata stub that points a design-source channel attachment at an image asset by URI.
questions: What channel-memory entry does this attachment belong to?
What does image://design-source/company-info/p-09 resolve to, and is it still available?
Is there a caption, alt text, or checksum for the image?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to record an image attachment reference, and it does exactly that.
intention_signals: It tries to create a stable, discoverable reference between a design-source channel memory item and a specific image asset so the image can be retrieved in context.
novelty: It uses a custom image:// URI scheme to address channel-local image assets rather than a relative file path.
contribution: It contributes a durable, id-addressable mapping that records which image asset is attached to the design-source channel and when the attachment was created.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only channel attachment metadata file that links attachment att-1b75dc12 in the design-source channel to the image asset image://design-source/company-info/p-09 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To provide a stable reference record for an image attachment associated with design-source channel memory.
